title: Auntie Mulberry's Magical Mole Pie
summary: Two curious moles named Disco and Thisco wander through the forest and stumble upon a mysterious cottage owned by Auntie Mulberry, a rabbit with purple hair and a passion for baking. Auntie Mulberry recruits the moles to help her find ingredients for a magical pie. Together, they gather an unusual assortment of fillings including sweet raisins, salty bacon, and a slithery mixture of slime and "cotton-all," creating a one-of-a-kind culinary adventure in the heart of the woods.

highlightQuote.text: A slithery and squishy... cotton-all. That's called a match-a-cola... and blue straw... and yummy... and also slime. Here you go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now, once upon a time, Disco and Thisco were wandering through the forest when they found a little cottage they'd never seen before. And they hid in the bushes, and they watched carefully. And suddenly they started to twitch their noses. Do you know why they did that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Because something smelled very nice. And then the little round door on the front of the cottage, it popped open. And guess who came out? It was a bunny, but it wasn't just any bunny. It was a bunny with purple hair on the top of her head and a bright red apron. And do you know why she was wearing an apron? Because she was baking. And she looked around and said, "Hmm, I wonder if there's anybody out here." And she wrinkled up her little nose and went "Sniff, sniff, sniff." And she said, "Do I smell some moles?" And what did Disco and Thisco do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They said "Yes".

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I heard a "yes". Are there little moles hiding in that bush? Come on out. My name is Auntie Mulberry.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And here's the next ring for this. We only got red, orange, yellow, green, but no blue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We're missing the blue ring, that's a good point. I'm not sure where it is.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You could make one out of pipe cleaners, that's a good idea. That is blue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Did you do it? Oh, you found the blue ring.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Auntie Mulberry said, "Excuse me, moles. Do you think you could help me with something?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I am about to bake a very special magical pie. But I could use some help getting the ingredients. Do you think you could help me?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank you. Now, let me see. I've got this pie tin and I made the pie crust. But I need to put in something delicious and sweet. Can you find something sweet for me?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Look, here's raisins!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, raisins! Good idea. I see you happen to have your own snack that you're carrying with you. I'll put some raisins in the pie. Now, what else do I need? Oh, I need something crunchy and salty. Do you think you could find that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, here's some crunchy and salty bacon.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, raisins and bacon... mmm, that sounds good. Now, a good pie also needs something squishy and slithery. Do you have anything like that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A slithery and squishy... cotton-all.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Squishy... nice cotton-all.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Cotton-all? What's that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That's called a match-a-cola... and blue straw... and yummy... and also slime. Here you go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Who's that?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who's that? Hi, Isabella.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Do you wanna play cats?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: Auntie Mulberry
characters.description: A bunny with purple hair and a bright red apron who lives in a cottage and enjoys baking magical pies.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.

places.name: Auntie Mulberry's Cottage
places.description: A small home in the forest with a round door where magical baking takes place.
